generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our current alliance commitments are actually making us LESS safe? Experts agree that spreading our forces thin across outdated partnerships leaves us vulnerable. Focus on securing our own borders first - that's the best way to protect our communities. #NationalSecurityFirst
